summary: Completed frontend-only Phase 1 validation for manager demo login, dashboard, profile, calendar, payments, settings, and manager tabs/dialogs. Core flows load and interactions work, but Phase 1 data-testid coverage is incomplete in active manager/settings paths.

ui_bugs.issue: Expected data-testid hooks are missing in runtime for manager root and manager tab triggers (e.g., manager-page, manager-tab-tournaments, manager-tab-assignments).
settings-notifications-card and settings-preferences-card are missing; weakens required Phase 1 test-id coverage.

issues: Multiple labels in AddGameDialog use text-slate-300 on white backgrounds (low contrast risk).

action_items: Resolve Manager route/component mismatch so Phase 1 instrumented manager file is the one rendered by /manager.
Add missing data-testid attributes to active settings notifications/preferences cards.
Re-run frontend regression for all requested Phase 1 flows after test-id fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: App imports `@/pages/Manager`, which resolves to `/app/src/pages/Manager.jsx` (legacy path) rather than `/app/src/pages/Manager/index.jsx` containing newer Phase 1 test-id coverage. This is the primary RCA for missing manager test IDs in runtime.
Settings subcomponents `NotificationsSettings.jsx` and `PreferencesSettings.jsx` still lack top-level card data-testid attributes, causing partial Phase 1 coverage failure.
Core functional flows remain operational with MOCKED local browser-storage data layer.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed data created; used built-in demo account creation/login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated flows via manager demo login on localhost: manager login -> manager tabs -> tournament dialog -> assignments dialog -> dashboard -> profile edit -> calendar availability dialog -> payments filters -> settings. If manager test IDs still appear missing, check route import resolution between /pages/Manager.jsx and /pages/Manager/index.jsx first.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: login as manager demo and inspect /manager for `manager-page` and manager tab data-testids. Observed missing in runtime while add-tournament-dialog and assignment card IDs exist. RCA: routing import uses `/src/pages/Manager.jsx` (legacy) instead of `/src/pages/Manager/index.jsx` where enhanced test-id coverage exists. Mitigation: align App import/export to the intended manager module and re-run UI coverage checks.
mocked_api: MOCKED: Local browser-storage data layer replacing original Supabase-backed flows.
